tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold repo + author data.json
tasks.description:
Author data.json (real 2026 draw, 20 players w/ transcribed R32 picks + bonus, empty results) + .nojekyll/.gitignore/README. COORDINATOR-EXECUTED (needs pick screenshots).

```json:metadata
{"files":["data.json",".nojekyll",".gitignore","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"node -e \"JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data.json'))\"","acceptanceCriteria":["valid JSON","12 groups x4","20 players","pick codes belong to group"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: compute.js group tables + tests
tasks.description:
Pure computeGroupTable/computeAllTables with node:test.

```json:metadata
{"files":["compute.js","test/compute.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/compute.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["standings correct","sort pts>gd>gf>name","LIVE like FT"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: compute.js projected qualifiers + tests
tasks.description:
projectedQualifiers (top-2 + 8 best thirds) -> {qualified,top2,started,groupQ,best8}.

```json:metadata
{"files":["compute.js","test/compute.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/compute.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["qualified size 32","groupQ 2 or 3","thirds ranked"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: compute.js scoring + standings + tests
tasks.description:
scorePlayer (q/g/total) + buildStandings (rank, mv).

```json:metadata
{"files":["compute.js","test/compute.test.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"node --test test/compute.test.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["q counts qualified","g +2 exact group","sort total>q>name","mv=prev-rank"]}
```

scripts/validate-data.mjs + test; coordinator review gate with organizer.

tasks.subject: Task 8: 12-hour update routine UPDATE.md
tasks.description:
routine/UPDATE.md: snapshot ranks, fetch results, update + lastUpdated, validate, push; forbids scoring edits.

```json:metadata
{"files":["routine/UPDATE.md"],"verifyCommand":"node --test && node scripts/validate-data.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["update flow documented","forbids hand-tally"]}
```
